patches.reason: Fix panic on startup - replace reqwest::blocking::Client with async reqwest::Client
patches.description: OpenFang crashed when backend=http because reqwest::blocking::Client was created inside async context. Changed to async client with thread-based blocking wrappers.
No longer needed after http_client.rs changes

patches.reason: Fix install_from_path() to respect OPENFANG_HOME instead of hardcoded ~/.openfang/hands/
patches.description: Added home_dir field to HandRegistry, new_with_home() constructor, install_from_path() now uses self.home_dir -> OPENFANG_HOME -> dirs::home_dir() fallback chain

patches.reason: Pass home_dir to HandRegistry so it respects OPENFANG_HOME
patches.description: One-line change: HandRegistry::new() -> HandRegistry::new_with_home(config.home_dir.clone()). Required counterpart to hands_registry.patch.
